meaning: 枫丹白露 [法国北部城镇](在巴黎东南,有著名的宫殿)
examples: A manager's task is to create a working environment that is like Fontainebleau, not Calcutta.
The French business school has campuses in Fontainebleau, outside Paris, and in Singapore.
The very last painting is Clouet's portrait of Francis I, who later brought Leonardo to his court at Fontainebleau.
It went under the hammer in Fontainebleau, south-east of Paris, at 10 times the initial estimate.
A. program to have full-fledged campuses on two continents--one in Fontainebleau, France and the other in Singapore.
